title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: To enroll in health insurance and dental options, employees must complete the enrollment process during the designated open enrollment period, which typically occurs annually in November. New hires are also eligible to enroll within 30 days of their start date. To begin the enrollment process, log into the employee portal and navigate to the 'Benefits' section, where you will find detailed information about available plans and coverage options. Once you have selected your preferred health and dental plans, complete the online enrollment form and submit it by the deadline. If you have any questions or need assistance, please contact the HR Benefits Team at benefits@company.com or call extension 1234. Remember, changes to your benefits can only be made during the open enrollment period or if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child.
